system.description:
The psyker subtly masks his intentions and manipulates others into reacting favourably. Make an Opposed Willpower Test. If the psyker succeeds, the target finds him to be a person deserving of respect and reacts positively to friendly overtures. Grants +30 to all Interaction Skill Tests against the target while maintained. This is not mind control — the psyker cannot force the target to act against their better judgement or harm themselves.

Focus Power Test: Opposed Willpower

XP Cost: 100
